name: delete_waivers
short_description: Delete one or more DRC/METHODOLOGY/CDC message waivers
full_help:
delete_waivers

Description: 
Delete one or more DRC/METHODOLOGY/CDC message waivers

Syntax: 
delete_waivers  [-scoped] [-quiet] [-verbose] [<objects>...]

Usage: 
  Name         Description
  ------------------------
  [-scoped]    Flag waiver to interpret object wildcards as scoped to the 
               current_instance that is set
  [-quiet]     Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]   Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<objects>]  List of waiver objects, or a list of message objects (cells, 
               nets, sites, etc.) for which DRC/METHODOLOGY waiver(s) were set

Categories: 
Waiver, Object

arguments.description: Flag waiver to interpret object wildcards as scoped to the current_instance that is set
Suspend message limits during command execution
